sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n26487" key="dieise/rxomai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">διεισέρχομαι</orth>, Medic., <sense id="n26487.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">effect an entrance through</tr_> pores or membranes, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0724.tlg002:1:165D" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Steph.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Hp.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.165D.</biblScope></bibl>, al.; also <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">διεισκρίνομαι</orth>, ibid.</sense> </entryFree>
